iOS / Swift E-Commerce Fashion

Nykaa Fashion

Contributed to the core shopping experiences, product discovery, and user engagement flows for the Nykaa Fashion iOS application — a premium fashion e-commerce platform offering curated collections, style recommendations, and seamless checkout experiences.

The Challenge

The fashion e-commerce space demands a visually rich, performant, and highly personalized mobile experience. The challenge was to build and optimize product discovery flows, curated collections, and recommendation engines that keep users engaged — while ensuring smooth performance with image-heavy pages and complex filtering systems.

Key Contributions

  • Product Discovery: Built intelligent product browsing experiences with advanced filtering, sorting, and category navigation for a large fashion catalog.
  • Shopping Experience: Developed core shopping flows including product detail views, size guides, wishlists, and add-to-cart interactions.
  • User Engagement: Implemented personalization features including style recommendations, recently viewed items, and curated outfit suggestions.
  • Performance Optimization: Optimized image-heavy pages with lazy loading, caching strategies, and efficient collection view rendering for smooth scrolling.
  • Checkout Flow: Contributed to the streamlined checkout experience with address management, payment integration, and order tracking.

Tech Stack

Swift

Primary development language

UIKit

Complex collection views and animations

REST APIs

Product catalog and user data services

SDWebImage

Efficient image loading and caching

Firebase

Analytics, push notifications, remote config

Core Animation

Smooth transitions and micro-interactions
